missions.title: Mastery Module 1: Work done by constant force and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering work done by constant force, work done by variable force, work calculation from F-x graph and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: Work done by constant force
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 11, Chapter: Work, Energy and Power, Section detailing Work done by constant force
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of Work done by constant force is heavily tested in recent NEET papers.
Applying the core principles of Work done by constant force correctly is essential for solving complex multi-step problems in Work, Energy and Power.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the subtle edge cases of Work done by constant force during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with Work done by constant force.
masteryCriteria: Understands and can apply concepts of Work done by constant force.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when Work done by constant force is integrated with other concepts in Work, Energy and Power.
pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently test the application of Work done by constant force in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: What are the critical factors or principles governing Work done by constant force?
Describe a scenario where applying the concept of Work done by constant force can lead to a common student error.
